text:
On Saturday evening, during her ten-night residency at Messe München, Munich,Adelepaused her show to watch the women’s 100m final.

Following her Las Vegas residency, Adele has taken her show to Munich, with a brand new set including the likes of “I’ll Be Waiting,” “All I Ask,” “Chasing Pavements,” and a cover of Bob Dylan’s “Make You Feel My Love". On Saturday (3 August), she paused her show and displayed the Olympic women's 100m final on the venue's big screens.

Adele halts her show in Munich to display the Women’s 100m Final at the#Olympics.pic.twitter.com/98n9SrLGj5

Last month,The Killers paused their headline show at The O2in London to show the final moments of England’s match against the Netherlands in the Euro 2024 semifinals. After England scored a goal in the 90th minute, confetti cannons erupted and the band went straight into playing the unofficial English national anthem, "Mr. Brightside".

Adele's residency in Munich began on 2 August and will end on 31 August. For more information, visitadele.com.

title: Adele pauses Munich concert to screen the women’s 100m final at Olympics | The Line of Best Fit
description: On Saturday evening, during her ten-night residency at Messe München, Munich, Adele paused her show to watch the women’s 100m final.
